subcodes.first_line: From the Ocean of Bounty of the Lord of existence and the Sovereign of the seen and unseen, We beseech, in every moment, His chosen ones and His faithful servants [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: از بحر جود مالک وجود و سلطان غیب و شهود می طلبیم اولیا و اصفیا را در هر حین
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @praise and encouragement
